text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is shaking. I guess it's only natural that
she get nervous before going head-to-head with
her best friend.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If you and all my supporters believe in me, then...
I believe in myself, too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There ya are, Oguri! I've been waitin' for ya.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tama. There's something I've been wanting to
say to you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...You're actin' kinda strange, but go on!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think of you as... my rival—and that means I
have to beat you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're all fired up! That's da kind of
fightin' spirit I've been waitin' for!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Show me what you're really made of! But don't expect me to wipe your tears when ya come home sobbin' like a baby!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If anyone's gonna need a shoulder to cry on
tonight, it's gonna be you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You crack me up! Hehe, that's more like it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's get this party started!
